title: Restore missing comic panels

requirements.text: Restore all comic panels that were removed in the previous version. Re-add the complete panel data to frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts to ensure all story scenes are displayed in the ComicViewer component.

quotes: ADD BACK THE MISSING PANELS BACK JUST RE-ADD IT

acceptanceCriteria: All previously existing comic panels are restored to comicData.ts
No scenes are missing when the comic is rendered in the ComicViewer
Panel sequence and chapter structure remain intact
All panel illustrations and text content are complete

constraints: Do not modify the existing ComicViewer component logic or rendering behavior
Preserve the current chapter structure and organization
Maintain compatibility with existing localization, deduplication, and narration features
nonGoals: Adding new comic panels that did not exist previously
Modifying the styling or layout of existing panels
Changing the timeline or narration features
